description: Style NoteThese stylish Drift cat III shoes from puma have a motorsport friendly design and are great for urban wear. These shoes are infused with the ferrari edge and their attractive low-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and a tee for a cool casual look. Product DetailsWhite shoe with synthetic upper, overlays, textile lining and elasticated loop with velcro closure for easy insertion and removal of the feetBranding on the tongue, cat logo embossed on the side and on the heel counter and Ferrari logo embossed on the heelLightly padded tongue and innerEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole and phylon midsole Non-slip rubber outsole in a tyre tread pattern, flex grooves and sole extending to heel counter for greater protection of the heel Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
